must_surface.rationale: BFO precedes (BFO_0000063) is transitive. A cycle (A precedes B, B precedes A) implies A precedes A, which under irreflexivity is inconsistent. If the reasoner returns clean, the loaded T-Box is missing IrreflexiveProperty on BFO_0000063 — surface as a Tester finding to Onto and consider a probe T-Box delta at tests/fixtures/probes/temporal_consistency_test.ttl asserting irreflexivity.
